_note: Committed known-bad example for the self-learning gate. A learned rule that addresses 'generic_recommendation' MUST flag this experiment (true positive). store_profile carries gingerpeople tokens so the rule can confirm the experiment lacks store-specific grounding.

experiments.title: Add urgency timers and exit-intent popups to lift conversion
experiments.hypothesis: Adding countdown timers, low-stock badges and exit-intent popups creates urgency and lifts conversion, as it does on most ecommerce sites.
experiments.primary_change: Add countdown timers, low-stock banners and exit-intent email popups site-wide.

experiments.title: Add a buying box to the GIN GINS PDP
experiments.hypothesis: The GIN GINS Original PDP has 86 reviews but no add-to-cart or retailer module, so high-intent shoppers have no clear next step.
experiments.primary_change: Add a 'Choose how to buy' box with retailer logos under the GIN GINS product title.
